title: Enki and the World Order
description: The Sumerian creation myth: Enki assigns every god, city, and element its proper function in the cosmos.
introduction: The Sumerian creation myth: Enki assigns every god, city, and element its proper function in the cosmos.

translation.original_text: en ḫe₂-ĝal₂ ni₂ me-lem₄-ma ḫuš a-a den-ki
translation.text: Lord of abundance, of faithful command, father Enki, born of a bull, begotten by a wild bull.
